message:
feat: Aggregate changelog from intermediate releases during version jumps

When checking for updates to a specific version that's ahead of current,
now computes an aggregated changelog covering all intermediate releases:

Changes to check.rs:
- fetch_specific_version() now fetches all releases when update available
- Calls compute_changelog_diff() to aggregate changes from current to target
- Falls back gracefully to None if release fetch fails

Changes to mod.rs:
- display_update_check() prefers changelog_diff over release_notes
- Shows "Changes since <current_version>:" header for aggregated diffs
- Falls back to single release notes if diff unavailable
- Adds "Run 'rch update' to update." prompt after version info

This improves the update experience when users skip multiple versions,
showing all changes they'll get rather than just the latest release notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
